message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam backgroundColor white

database "tuple" as tuple
actor "Upper\nlayer" as upper

box "IP Layer" #LightGray
participant "IPv4\nlayer" as ipv4layer
database "Routing\ntable" as routing
end box

box "IPv4 Ineterface" #LightGray
participant "IPv4\ninterface" as ipv4iface
database "ARP" as arp
end box

actor "Lower\nlayer" as lower

note left of tuple : IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1

upper -> ipv4layer : IPdata

note over ipv4layer : Allocate\nIPv4\nheader

ipv4layer -> routing : dst=192.0.2.1
routing --> ipv4layer

note left of tuple : IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1

ipv4layer --> upper
ipv4layer -> ipv4iface

ipv4iface --> ipv4layer

note left of tuple : IPv4.src=198.51.100.2

ipv4iface -> arp : gw=198.51.100.1
arp --> ipv4iface : mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01

ipv4iface --> ipv4layer

note left of tuple : Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01

ipv4layer -> lower

@enduml
